18 - QA 8.2.mp4
Welcome to the Q &A section. This is all about the core values. I'm going to open up. And as always, if we don't answer it, put the questions below and we'll get to them. How'd you come up with the seven deadly business habits? So the seven— I lived through them. I lived through the pain, right? As I took an agency from six people to 200 plus people to, you know, even more people, I started to identify where we were weak and I associated it with those seven. Right. So that I had to learn it by fire. Right. I had to learn by living through that in that experience of people behaving that way in my businesses, behaving that way before I identified it and corrected it.
How far into running your agency were you when you came up with this list? Man, I was probably 150 people plus. Okay, so people who are... who are starting the scaling process, would you recommend reflecting on their own lessons so far? No, dude, those seven are applicable, right? If you want to alter them and change them, great, but... Those are real legitimate issues. And if you would tolerate that, that toxicity, you'll be in trouble. Okay, so same thing for your 7W business habits. Are you printing signage and putting these things around the office? Or are you just going around and forcing them? Oh, no. You walk in, and I have examples here in a little bit. You could Grim Reaper an entire column, an entire wall with the Deadly Seven.
When you walked in the conference rooms... Every conference table, one of our office, we had 18 conference rooms and every conference room had this laminated on it, right? You have to have visual cues and reminders of the things you can't do and the things you should do. Is there any recommendations or pro tips for linking your principles to visuals? I noticed you referenced a few times. Yeah, 100%. Listen, you have to create an environment that stimulates and reminds you of those behaviors that you should do and you shouldn't do. So 100%, your environment should tell a story of your core values. And I'm gonna have a video coming up that demonstrates that. Nice. And then, did you ever change your core values?
No, for us, and again, now I think it's okay to change it, right? I mean, I think anything, if it's not working, is okay to change. But for mine, we were steadfast on those. They worked for us and we just, we never changed them. That wraps up the core values, the deadly seven habits. Again, put the comments below. We'll get those questions answered. Download The Deadly Seven. Feel free to take the ones exactly in there. Go get the artwork. Vinyl your wall, walls in your office. Change your mindset. Change your behaviors. Implement your core values and watch your revenue skyrocket. I'll see you in the next section.
